arts.ttl: Milan v Liverpool: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Milan prepare for their Champions League opener against Liverpool, manager Paulo Fonseca faces a crucial decision regarding his starting lineup. The match, set to be a litmus test for both teams’ ambitions this season, comes on the heels of Milan’s confidence-boosting victory over Venezia and precedes the highly anticipated derby against Inter Milan. Fonseca’s starting eleven is nearly settled, with only a few positions still in question. In attack, Alvaro Morata is set to return, relegating Tammy Abraham to the bench.
